meta.title: Canvas Components Design Specification
meta.description: Comprehensive specification for all Konva canvas/visualization components: ERDViewer, ColumnMapper, and FlowchartViewer

tableColors.description: 17 vibrant colors with lighter variants, shared across ERD and ColumnMapper

colorAssignment.ERD: index = table index % 17 (with temporal grouping option)
colorAssignment.ColumnMapper: source table uses colorIndex 0 (Indigo), target table uses colorIndex 5 (Rose), mapping lines use hash of mapping.id % 17

tableWidthCalculation.description: Dynamic table width calculation used by both ERD and ColumnMapper

ERDViewer.description: Entity-Relationship Diagram viewer with Konva canvas, supporting FK relationships, drag-to-reposition, multi-select, marquee selection, zoom, search, and export

scriptId.description: Used for localStorage position persistence key

handlers.onClick: clear selection if empty canvas click without Ctrl
handlers.onMouseDown: start marquee selection if Ctrl+click on empty canvas
handlers.onMouseUp: finalize marquee selection, select intersecting tables

ERDTableNode.description: Memoized table card component with custom comparison to prevent unnecessary re-renders

ERDEdgePath.description: Memoized FK relationship edge rendered as SVG path via Konva Path

connectionRendering.description: Bezier curve connections between table columns for FK relationships

sideSelection.algorithm: computeConnectionHandlePos - determines left/right sides based on table overlap
rules: If total horizontal intersection <= targetW + sourceW + gap: both Left
If source right < target right: source Right, target Left

relationSymbols.source: Many symbol (crow's foot) - 3 lines from point spreading halfHeight=5
relationSymbols.target: One symbol (vertical line) - single line halfHeight=3

dagre.description: Default layout for connected tables using dagre
process: Run dagre on connected tables only
Place isolated tables horizontally below connected tables
Wrap isolated tables to next row when exceeding maxRowWidth (max(connectedWidth, 1200))

elk.description: Smart layout using ELK.js (optional, toggled via smartAutoLayout setting)
postProcess: Master+temporal tables placed side-by-side (temporal to right of master, 30px gap)
Collision detection: push overlapping tables right or down
Fallback to dagre if ELK fails

temporalGrouping.description: Tables ending with _T are grouped with their master table
temporalGrouping.colorGrouping: Temporal table gets same colorIndex as master
temporalGrouping.layoutGrouping: Same ELK partition for side-by-side placement

wheelZoom.algorithm: Calculate mousePointTo in canvas coords, compute new scale, adjust stagePosition to keep pointer stable

tableDrag.multiDrag: Ctrl+click to select, drag group moves all selected tables by delta

search.resultSorting: exact matches first, then tables before columns
search.onSelect: center on table, highlight for 3 seconds

keyboard.Escape: Clear selection, close dropdowns, clear search

clickOnTable.normalClick: Clear selection if clicking unselected table

fitView.algorithm: Find min/max bounds of all nodes, compute scale to fit with 0.9 multiplier, center content

resetView.resetPositions: Clear localStorage, recompute layout (smart or dagre)

styling.background: light: rgba(248,250,252,0.95), darkSlate: rgba(31,41,55,0.95), vscodeGray: rgba(45,45,48,0.95)

edgeCaseHandling.emptyTables: Shows empty-state div with 'No Tables to Display' message
edgeCaseHandling.copiedPositions: Merge with existing positions, auto-select matched tables
edgeCaseHandling.computingLayout: Show spinning icon with 'Computing...' label, disable button

ColumnMapper.exportType: default (from ColumnMapper.tsx), also exports MappingStateForSidebar type
ColumnMapper.description: Column mapping canvas with source and target table side-by-side, bezier mapping lines, drag-to-map, click-to-map with search, linkage table view, summary view, and type rules view

scripts.description: Always reloaded from localStorage on mount
Local copy, reloaded from localStorage on mount

project.description: Merged project with mappings from all related projects

dimensions.note: Start at 0 to avoid initial flash

hoveredRow.type: { table: string; column: string; side: 'source' | 'target' } | null

canvasLayout.description: Two tables placed side-by-side with fixed gap

tableRendering.description: renderTable function renders a single table card on canvas

srcTgtBadge.description: Oval badge showing SRC or TGT

handlers: onClick: if !hasMoved, select mapping or open search popup

columnName.fill: migrationNotNeeded ? '#666666' : hasPopupOpen ? sideColor : isMapped ? mappingColor.regular : theme.text.primary

clickTarget.description: Invisible wider path for easier clicking

dragToMap.end: onMouseUp/onTouchEnd on target column row (opposite side only)
dragToMap.visual: Dashed line from source column to cursor position

flow: Search popup shows unmapped columns from opposite side

mappedColumnClick.description: Clicking an already-mapped column shows 'Column Already Mapped' popup with navigate option

rightClickColumn.description: Shows allMappedTablesPopup with all mappings across all schemas for this column

doubleClickColumn.description: Jump to linkage tab with mapping selected

doubleClickEdge.description: Jump to linkage tab with mapping selected

deleteMapping.keyboard: Delete or Backspace (when canvas tab active, not in input)

canvas.description: Visual mapping canvas with two tables and bezier lines
canvas.label: Canvas

linkage.description: Tabular view of all mappings with type/nullable comparison
linkage.label: Linkage Table

summary.description: All mappings across all related projects
summary.label: All Mappings

instructionsOverlay.content: Click a column to start mapping | Or drag from source to target

headerToolbar.description: Top toolbar with script and table selectors

FlowchartViewer.description: Activity diagram / flowchart viewer with Konva canvas, supporting swimlanes, various node types, dagre layout, drag-to-reposition, zoom, and search

renderOrder: renderConnections() - bezier connection lines with arrowheads

start.positionOffset: Group positioned at pos.x + TERMINAL_RADIUS, pos.y + TERMINAL_RADIUS

konvaShapes.description: Inner circle 6px smaller radius than outer

stop.positionOffset: Group positioned at pos.x + TERMINAL_RADIUS, pos.y + TERMINAL_RADIUS

kill.positionOffset: Group positioned at pos.x + width/2, pos.y + height/2

connectionRendering.pathPoints: [startX, startY, startX, midY, endX, midY, endX, endY]

search.onSelect: Center on node, highlight for 3 seconds

resetView.action: scale=0.9, position={50,50}, clear nodePositions, remove localStorage

subtitle.text: Create a flowchart in the Scripts page to view it here

calculateTableWidth.description: Calculates width to fit column names and types without wrapping

getTableColorIndex.signature: (tableName: string, allTables: Table[], groupTemporal: boolean) => number
getTableColorIndex.description: Returns color index, grouping temporal tables (_T suffix) with their master table when groupTemporal is true

computeConnectionHandlePos.signature: (sourceX, sourceW, targetX, targetW) => [Position, Position, number, number]
computeConnectionHandlePos.description: Determines which side (left/right) to connect edges from based on table positions

getBezierPath_ERD.description: SVG path with cubic bezier, relation symbol offsets, and curvature control

getBezierPath_ColumnMapper.description: Simplified bezier path for column mapping lines

getMappingColorIndex.description: Hash of mapping.id to get consistent color index
getMappingColorIndex.algorithm: ((hash << 5) - hash) + charCode for each char, Math.abs(hash) % 17

getOneSymbol.description: Vertical line (|) for 'one' side of FK relationship

getManySymbol.description: Crow's foot (< or >) for 'many' side of FK relationship

ERDViewer: ERDTableNode is wrapped in React.memo with custom comparison (11 fields)
ERDEdgePath is wrapped in React.memo with custom comparison (7 fields)
Table drag uses requestAnimationFrame throttling via pendingDragRef
Multi-drag uses refs (multiDragStartRef, pendingMultiDragRef) to avoid stale closures
nodeMap is precomputed via useMemo for O(1) edge source/target lookups
Edge extraction from FK constraints is memoized
ColumnMapper: Dimension updates debounced with ResizeObserver + requestAnimationFrame
Multiple setTimeout retries for initial dimension measurement (50ms, 150ms, 300ms)
Fresh data loaded from localStorage in handlers to avoid stale closure issues
FlowchartViewer: layoutData computed via useMemo, recalculates only when selectedScript changes

dependencies.konva: Direct import for Konva types (KonvaEventObject, Stage ref)
dependencies.dagre: @dagrejs/dagre - graph layout for both ERD and Flowchart
dependencies.elk: elkjs/lib/elk.bundled.js - advanced layout for ERD (smart mode)
